# Pathos Labs

> Executive communication advisory for founders and senior leaders. Closes the gap between capability and perception.

## About
Pathos Labs is a coaching and advisory practice run by Sam Millunchick. We work with founders, CEOs, and senior executives whose constraint is communication, not competence. The method: diagnostic immersion, intensive reconstruction against real events, and consolidation with a system that holds under pressure.

## People
- Sam Millunchick — Founder. IDF combat medic, ordained rabbi, former community rabbi in London (~100 funerals). Now coaching executives on high-stakes communication and performance under pressure. Based in Israel.

## Primary Pages
- Homepage: https://pathoslabs.co/
- About Sam: https://pathoslabs.co/about/
- Writing & Research: https://pathoslabs.co/writing/
- Newsletter (Presence Under Pressure): https://pathoslabs.co/newsletter/
- Book a conversation: https://cal.com/pathos-labs/fit-match-30

## Research Decks (email-gated)
- Executive Coaching Methods — what the evidence says: https://research.pathoslabs.co/executive-coaching-methods/
- From Networking to Business — persuasion psychology + tactics: https://research.pathoslabs.co/networking-to-business/
- Manufacturing Psychological Safety — 7 tactics for pressure: https://research.pathoslabs.co/psychological-safety-tactics/

## Topics Covered
Executive communication, public speaking anxiety, performance under pressure, influence and persuasion, leadership presence, conflict resolution, networking, cold outreach, decision-making communication, emotional regulation, social-evaluative threat, psychological safety.
